channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Avril Celebrates 40, Attributes Youthfulness To Self-Care And Peaceful Relationships
item.description: Kenyan singer and songwriter Judith Nyambura Mwangi, popularly known as Avril, recently celebrated her 40th birthday, expressing gratitude to her fans for their love and support. She shared on Instagr...

item.title: Bam Margera’s career journey and current net worth in 2026
item.description: Bam Margera, the American skateboarder and TV personality, has seen his fortune fluctuate dramatically over the years. As of 2026, his net worth stands at about $1 million, a significant drop from his...

item.title: Transport officials accused of irregular IT fees and possible contract violations

item.title: Pakistan Navy and Maritime Security Agency Rescue Seven Sailors Including Indians in Arabian Sea
item.description: On May 4, 2026, the Pakistan Navy along with the Pakistan Maritime Security Agency (PMSA) carried out a humanitarian operation in the Arabian Sea, providing assistance to seven sailors stranded aboard...

item.title: FG says Nigerians in South Africa must fund their own voluntary return amid xenophobia concerns
item.description: The Nigerian Ministry of Foreign Affairs don talk say any Nigerian wey wan return from South Africa because of rising xenophobic tension go have to pay for their own trip. According to the ministry sp...

item.title: ODM Faces Internal Struggles as Ruth Odinga’s Warnings on Sifuna’s Marginalisation Come True
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) is currently grappling with a serious identity crisis after sidelining Edwin Sifuna, a move that has backfired spectacularly. Ruth Odinga had warned the party lead...

item.title: Crowd Disturbance at N1 City Mall Parking Lot Over Weekend
item.description: Over the past weekend, videos circulating on social media showed chaotic scenes at the N1 City Mall parking lot, where a large group of youths had gathered for what has been described as a 'park-off'....

item.title: Significant Historical Events That Shaped the World on May 5
item.description: May 5 has seen numerous pivotal moments throughout history. In 1760, Laurence Shirley, the 4th Earl Ferrers, was executed at Tyburn in London for murdering his steward, demonstrating that the law appl...

item.title: Exploring the Imaginative 3D Machines of Gao Yang and Kisame
item.description: The 3D digital artworks of Chinese artists Gao Yang and Kisame (Yu-Lei Wang) present a striking exploration of fantastical machines that blur the line between reality and imagination. Featured in the ...

item.title: Federal prosecutors allege Jonathan Rinderknecht started deadly Palisades fire
item.description: Jonathan Rinderknecht, 30, was arrested in connection with the devastating Palisades fire, one of the costliest wildfires in U.S. history. Prosecutors allege that Rinderknecht, motivated by resentment...

item.title: Ukraine and Russia Announce Separate Temporary Ceasefires Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: In recent developments, Russia has announced a unilateral ceasefire with Ukraine from May 8–9, coinciding with Moscow's annual World War II Victory Day celebrations. The Russian defence ministry warne...

item.title: Cornet Mamabolo Returns to Acting as Peter Mokaba in New Film

item.title: Four Arrested Over Attempted Jet Fuel Theft at Wilson Airport
item.description: Nairobi detectives from the Kenya Airport Police Unit (KAPU) successfully foiled an attempted jet fuel theft at Wilson Airport. On Monday, May 3, the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) repor...

item.title: Two arrested in Romford over suspected arson at Golders Green memorial wall
item.description: Two individuals have been arrested as part of a counter-terrorism investigation into a suspected arson attack on a memorial wall in Golders Green, north-west London. The arrests, which involved a 46-y...

item.title: Elon Musk Agrees to $1.5 Million Settlement with SEC Over 2022 Twitter Disclosure Delay
item.description: On May 4, 2026, billionaire Elon Musk reached a settlement agreement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to resolve a civil lawsuit concerning his 2022 acquisition of Twitter, now r...

item.title: John Travolta’s Current Relationship Status and Family Life
item.description: John Travolta, the famous American actor, has been living a private life following the death of his wife, Kelly Preston, in 2020. While there are rumours linking him to fellow actress Kim Basinger, ne...

item.title: Four Australians and other passengers quarantined on cruise ship amid hantavirus outbreak
item.description: Four Australians are currently stranded on the Dutch-flagged cruise ship MV Hondius, which remains off the coast of Cape Verde following a suspected hantavirus outbreak. The vessel carries 149 passeng...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari Wins Bhabanipur, BJP Sweeps West Bengal Assembly Elections
item.description: In a significant political development in West Bengal, BJP's Suvendu Adhikari has defeated incumbent Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee in the Bhabanipur constituency during the 2026 Assembly elections. T...

item.title: NASA Temporarily Shuts Down Voyager 1 Instrument to Conserve Power
item.description: NASA has turned off the Low-energy Charged Particles (LECP) instrument on Voyager 1, a nearly 50-year-old spacecraft exploring interstellar space, to preserve its limited power supply. Voyager 1, laun...
